innateAbility.name: Break of Dawn
innateAbility.description: Whenever the sun comes out, Valora gains bonus base damage and vision that decreases throughout the course of the day.

abilities.name: Starbreaker
abilities.description: Dawnbreaker whirls her hammer multiple times, damaging enemies with her attack plus bonus damage.

abilities.name: Celestial Hammer
abilities.description: Hurls Brightmaul toward a targeted location, damaging enemy units struck along the way.The hammer pauses for a duration at the destination before flying back to her.

abilities.name: Converge
abilities.description: Dawnbreaker can recall Brightmaul at any time, pulling her towards it so they meet in the middle.Both Dawnbreaker and Brightmaul create fire trails as they converge.

abilities.name: Luminosity
abilities.description: After a number of attacks, Dawnbreaker powers up, charging her next attack with a critical strike that heals allied heroes within the radius.

abilities.name: Solar Guardian
abilities.description: Temporary calls upon daytime and creates a pulsing effect at a location near an allied hero anywhere on the map.Each pulse damages enemy units and heals allied units.

talents.right: x1.4 Celestial Hammer Contact Damage/Damage per Second

talents.left: Celestial Hammer Grants Allies Move Speed
